news.title:
Anand Rathi upgrades Tata Steel to 'Buy' with a revised target price of Rs 240.
Tata Steel's EU ops near breakeven; domestic capacity hits 27.35MT; strong price recovery boosts margins.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi upgrades Tata Steel to 'Buy' with a revised target price of Rs 240.
Tata Steel's EU ops near breakeven; domestic capacity hits 27.35MT; strong price recovery boosts margins.

news.title:
Tata Steel completes acquisition of Medica TS Hospital, now a wholly-owned subsidiary.
Buyout includes 7.4 lakh equity shares and 2.3 crore OCRPS for ₹1.49 crore.
news.summary:
Tata Steel completes acquisition of Medica TS Hospital, now a wholly-owned subsidiary.
Buyout includes 7.4 lakh equity shares and 2.3 crore OCRPS for ₹1.49 crore.

news.title:
Odisha seeks Centre's nod to divert 216.9 ha forest land in Keonjhar.
Land diversion is for Tata Steel's exploration of Gandhalapada iron ore block.
news.summary:
Odisha seeks Centre's nod to divert 216.9 ha forest land in Keonjhar.
Land diversion is for Tata Steel's exploration of Gandhalapada iron ore block.

news.title:
Tata Steel challenges coal demand notices of ₹385.2 crore for excess Jharia mine production in FY01-FY17.
Ministry of Coal admitted revision applications; no coercive actions during pending revision.
news.summary:
Tata Steel challenges coal demand notices of ₹385.2 crore for excess Jharia mine production in FY01-FY17.
Ministry of Coal admitted revision applications; no coercive actions during pending revision.

news.title:
Tata Steel gets High Court stay on tax proceedings until March 25, 2026.
The stay temporarily halts legal processes related to the tax matter.
news.summary:
Tata Steel gets High Court stay on tax proceedings until March 25, 2026.
The stay temporarily halts legal processes related to the tax matter.

news.title:
Tata Steel faces ₹1,007 Cr GST demand; ₹493 Cr net disputed post-payment.
Tax authorities imposed ₹493 Cr tax, ₹638 Cr penalty; HC granted stay.
news.summary:
Tata Steel faces ₹1,007 Cr GST demand; ₹493 Cr net disputed post-payment.
Tax authorities imposed ₹493 Cr tax, ₹638 Cr penalty; HC granted stay.

news.title:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.
news.summary:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
Tata Steel Ltd invested USD 180M to acquire more shares in T Steel Holdings.
This acquisition maintains Tata Steel's full ownership in the foreign subsidiary.
news.summary:
Tata Steel Ltd invested USD 180M to acquire more shares in T Steel Holdings.
This acquisition maintains Tata Steel's full ownership in the foreign subsidiary.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.

news.title:
UK's tariff and quota changes may support Tata Steel's UK business but breakeven shifts to FY27.
Analysts say policy benefits will be gradual; weak UK pricing remains a challenge for Tata Steel.
news.summary:
UK's tariff and quota changes may support Tata Steel's UK business but breakeven shifts to FY27.
Analysts say policy benefits will be gradual; weak UK pricing remains a challenge for Tata Steel.

news.title:
Tata Steel benefits from India's growth and lower global cost outlook.
Protection measures in EU, UK strengthen Tata Steel's geographic positioning.
news.summary:
Tata Steel benefits from India's growth and lower global cost outlook.
Protection measures in EU, UK strengthen Tata Steel's geographic positioning.

news.title:
Tata Steel, M&M, JSW Steel, and Tech Mahindra led Nifty gains this week.
Waaree, Premier, Paytm, Angel One, and Page Industries rose in midcaps; Petronet, Bandhan Bank fell.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sensex closes 326 points higher; Nifty above 23,100.
Tata Steel and TechM each gain 3% during market session.

news.title:
Punjab CM inaugurates Tata Steel's ₹3,200-cr green steel plant in Ludhiana.
The plant spans 115 acres, with 0.75 MT capacity, creating 2,500 jobs.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel Ltd. redeemed a ₹200 crore Commercial Paper (CP) on March 20, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI's guidelines for non-convertible securities and commercial papers.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel gains on launch of scrap-based electric arc furnace.
Tata Steel's Q3 FY26 profit surged 723.1% to Rs 2,688.7 crore.
